name: Al-Quran Al-Kareem – Deluxe Leather Bound (Arabic/English)
description: A beautifully bound Mushaf with side-by-side Arabic text and English translation, gold-embossed cover, gilded page edges, and a ribbon bookmark. Ideal for daily recitation or as a meaningful gift.

name: Pocket Quran – Compact Travel Edition
description: Lightweight, compact Mushaf sized for travel bags and pockets. Clear Uthmani script on premium off-white paper with a soft, durable cover.

name: Quran with Tajweed Rules (Color-Coded)
description: Color-coded Tajweed markings help you recite with correct pronunciation and rules. Large, easy-to-read font, perfect for learners of all ages.

name: Quran with Tajweed Rules (Color-Coded)
description: Color-coded Tajweed markings help you recite with correct pronunciation and rules. Large, easy-to-read font, perfect for learners of all ages.

name: Turkish Velvet Janamaz – Emerald Green
description: Plush, cushioned velvet prayer mat woven with a traditional mihrab (arch) motif. Non-slip backing and generous padding for comfortable daily salah.

name: Foldable Travel Prayer Mat with Compass
description: Compact, water-resistant prayer mat that folds into a slim pouch with a built-in Qibla compass — perfect for travel, office, or outdoor prayers.

name: Kids' Janamaz Set – Learn to Pray
description: A soft, colourful prayer mat sized for children, paired with an illustrated guide to help them learn the steps of salah.

name: Kids' Janamaz Set – Learn to Pray
description: A soft, colourful prayer mat sized for children, paired with an illustrated guide to help them learn the steps of salah.

name: Musk Al-Haramain Attar – 12ml Alcohol-Free
description: A rich, long-lasting musk-based attar with warm oud undertones. Alcohol-free and safe to wear during prayer. Comes in a roll-on glass bottle.

name: Rose & Oud Attar Gift Set (3 x 6ml)
description: A trio of premium rose, oud, and sandalwood attars in a gift-ready box — a thoughtful present for Eid, weddings, or any special occasion.

name: Zamzam-Inspired Amber Attar – 6ml
description: A warm, amber-forward fragrance with soft spice notes. Long-lasting and gentle on the skin, perfect for everyday wear.

name: 99-Bead Wooden Tasbih – Sandalwood
description: Handcrafted 99-bead tasbih carved from fragrant sandalwood, strung on a durable cord with a decorative tassel. Naturally soothing scent.

name: Digital Tasbih Counter – Rechargeable
description: A sleek digital dhikr counter with a bright display, memory function, and USB rechargeable battery. Slim enough to carry anywhere.

name: Crystal Quartz Tasbih – 33 Beads
description: Elegant 33-bead tasbih made from polished crystal quartz, finished with a gold-tone tassel. A refined piece for daily dhikr.

name: Ayatul Kursi Metal Wall Art – Gold Finish
description: Elegant laser-cut metal calligraphy panel of Ayatul Kursi in a warm gold finish, ready to hang. A striking centrepiece for any room.

name: Moroccan-Style Islamic Lantern
description: Hand-finished metal lantern with intricate cut-out geometric patterns that cast beautiful light shadows. Battery candle included.

name: 99 Names of Allah Canvas Print
description: A minimalist canvas print featuring the 99 Names of Allah (Asma-ul-Husna) in elegant calligraphy, framed and ready to hang.

name: Embroidered Kufi Prayer Cap
description: Soft, breathable cotton kufi cap with fine embroidered detailing, available in a comfortable one-size-fits-most fit.

name: Islamic Gift Box – Quran, Attar & Tasbih Set
description: A curated gift set featuring a pocket Quran, a 6ml attar, and a wooden tasbih, packaged in a decorative keepsake box — perfect for Eid or Ramadan gifting.

name: Vacuum –Packed Natural Miswak
description: Freshly cut, vacuum-sealed Miswak. 100% natural twig that brightens teeth, strengthens gums and revives Sunnah.

name: Zaitoon –Natural Miswak
description: Traditional Olive wood Miswak. Naturally cleans teeth, strengthens gums, and promotes daily Sunnah oral hygiene.

name: Natural Loose Miswak
description: Natural loose Miswak twig. Traditional chemical-free toothbrush that brightens teeth, strengthens gums & Sunnah.

name: Natural Loose Miswak
description: Natural loose Miswak twig. Traditional chemical-free toothbrush that brightens teeth, strengthens gums & Sunnah.
